issues.description: DSL is missing the primary effect. The card has two distinct effects: (1) Activate: Main with conditional DON!! activation, and (2) End of Your Turn with Minks character activation. Current DSL only includes a Rest action with no conditional logic or DON/character activation.
First effect requires condition 'LeaderHasType' with type 'Minks', not 'Always'.
Missing action to activate DON!! cards. Should include action type for setting DON cards as active (likely a custom action or state change, not just Rest).
Missing second effect entirely: '[End of Your Turn] Set up to 1 of your {Minks} type Characters as active.' Should be a separate effect with trigger 'EndOfTurn'.
